{{Infobox character
| name = Zhen of the Masons
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
| name = Zhen of the Masons
| aliases = Zhen
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow
| titles = Mason
| abilities = fighter using knives
| affiliations = House of the Masons
| introduced = ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea
}}

''See also: [[Zhen of the Masons Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen is a prominent member and leader within the [[Masons]], an organization that functions as part of the [[Consultant's Guild]]. The [[Masons]] specialize in undercover infiltration, utilizing professional expertise and disguises to gather intelligence for the [[Consultants]]. The guild operates by training children in various real-world professions—such as scholars, merchants, or guardsmen—so they can act as experts and insiders within different social spheres. Zhen maintains a headquarters known as the [[House of the Masons]], a gray building that features decoy doors and hidden entrances. As an experienced [[Mason]], Zhen is skilled in the art of deception and character work, often teaching others how to pose as specific social classes or use dialect to maintain a cover. He is characterized by his white mustache and his ability to blend into various roles, though he has also been known to use unconventional items like soup bowls as shields. While the [[Masons]] are trained to be inconspicuous, Zhen has expressed that boldness can sometimes serve as an effective disguise. He maintains a complex relationship with other members of the [[Consultants]], including [[Gardeners]] and [[Architects]], often navigating the strict laws and expectations of the [[Guild]].}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|As the owner of the [[House of the Masons]], Zhen served as a teacher to [[Shera]]. During their time together, the mustachioed instructor would lift [[Shera]] into the air by her armpits and teach her to project confidence even when she lacked knowledge on a subject. Later, Zhen was found waiting in a room alongside [[Kerian]] and [[Tyril]]. A fighter who carries two [[steel]] knives, Zhen eventually inquired about the next course of action.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Zhen of the Masons]] was a teacher to [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c4">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen lifted [[Shera]] into the air by her armpits.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen has a mustache.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen taught [[Shera]] that it is best to sound confident when you have no idea what you are talking about.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c7">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen owns the [[House of the Masons]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen was waiting in the room with [[Kerian]] and [[Tyril]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen carries two [[steel]] knives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen is a fighter using knives.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|Zhen asked what to do next.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c15" />}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Lucan]] trained with Zhen before [[Meia]] reached the island.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c7">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Zhen has a house with racks containing dresses.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c18">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Zhen has nothing to destroy the Heart.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c20">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|An elderly member of the [[Masons]], Zhen maintains a home fortified with various alarms, potential entrances, and decoys designed to act as traps. Within the basement of this residence, several coffins are kept in storage. During an encounter with [[Lucan]], Zhen questioned whether the man had successfully located his objective. In a moment of conflict, Zhen utilized a soup bowl to serve as a shield.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen asked [[Lucan]] if he found what he came for.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen is an old [[Mason]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen has a basement containing coffins.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen was not interrogated by Yala.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen has a house with decoys and traps.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen has a home with potential entrances and alarms.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Zhen uses a soup bowl as a shield.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c15" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“Did you find what you came for?” Zhen asked, seemingly disinterested.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:House of the Masons]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
